# Copilot Instructions

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions

## Project-Specific Rules
- DotNetCrawler must stay as a .NET Framework 4.8.1 project (C# 7.3, old-style csproj) to maintain maximum compatibility when crawling .NET Framework applications.
- Do NOT use ApplicationCrawler.Console for this work.
